inline_comments.message: Can you please explain why do we need two different kafka deployments - counting and processing?

I believe that is how we planned this component, to be able to run it in two different configurations (just-count and process). AFAIK if I were to put both in same deployment, we wouldn't be able to configure Prometheus to scrape metrics from two different ports on same pod.
Having separate deployments also allows us flexible runing and scaling single style of consumer, so it seemed to me logical to split them.
